items.summary: European Commission Statement Évian, 15 Jun 2026 I am looking forward to this G7 in Évian under the French Presidency. We meet against the backdrop of geopolitical fragmentation, economic reconfiguration and a rapid technological change. Our main goal here is, on the one hand, to address the structural challenges of the global economy, specifically global imbalances and overcapacities. And on the other hand, we want to focus on crises that are affecting all of us – the war in Ukraine, the conflict in the Middle East, and indeed Ebola.
